rationale: All seven dimensions are captured with depth. Industry (AI, foundation models + inference, dual-track B2B/B2C), geography (HQ Italy + 5 operating jurisdictions), regulatory baseline (9 frameworks including AI Act and US state AI laws with proper provenance), recurring matters (4 work shapes), stakeholders (reports-to + 3 key partners + escalation threshold), risk appetite (growth-oriented), and open notes (code-gen product, AI Act classification open, B2C moderation refresh, enterprise deal cycles). The intake demonstrates strong fidelity to the seed.
